message:
✨ Consolidate dashboard actions into FAB and fix mission sidebar overlap (#235)

Replace three separate floating buttons (Add Card, Templates, Reset) with a
single "+" FAB that expands into a menu on click. Fix mission sidebar
overlapping dashboard content by synchronizing the sidebar width (500px) with
Layout margin-right and offline banner positioning.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
